items.title: Business Name Registration (BN)
items.description: Register a business name with CAC, including guidance on name availability, classification and documentation.

items.title: Private Limited Company (LTD) Registration
items.description: End-to-end incorporation for an LTD: reserved name, filings, documents and CAC submission support.

items.title: NGO / Incorporated Trustees
items.description: Support for Incorporated Trustees registration: constitution, trustees, publication steps, and CAC filings.

items.title: Post-Incorporation Updates
items.description: Director/shareholder changes, address updates, share capital changes, and other CAC post-incorporation filings.

items.title: TIN & Statutory Registrations
items.description: Help with TIN and common statutory compliance steps needed for business operations.
